BundleInfo.name: ChimeraX-ESM_MSR_Visualizer
BundleInfo.Author: Shawn Reeves
BundleInfo.Synopsis: Interfaces with ESM-MSR to predict and visualize (multi-)mutant stability effects.
BundleInfo.Description: Interfaces with ESM-MSR to predict and visualize (multi-)mutant stability effects.

Classifiers.ChimeraXClassifier: ChimeraX :: Tool :: ESM_MSR_Visualizer :: Visualization :: Visualizes ESM-MSR scores
